# Cody PC080SN Dest Trace (Task 1)

## Capture Method

- Temporary instrumentation was added to `genesistan_hook_tilemap_plane_a` to write header/descriptor trace fields into a dedicated WRAM trace buffer, then dumped via MAME Genesis Lua script.
- Dump source files:
  - `build/analysis225/genesis_trace_meta.txt`
  - `build/analysis225/genesis_trace_headers.csv`
  - `build/analysis225/genesis_trace_desc.csv`
- Runtime command used:
  - `GENESISTAN_ROOT=/home/tighe/projects/rastan-genesis mame megadriv -cart apps/rastan-direct/dist/rastan_direct_video_test.bin -autoboot_script /tmp/collect_genesis_pc080sn.lua -nothrottle -video none -sound none -skip_gameinfo -seconds_to_run 80`

Observed meta:
- `frame=3000`
- `trace_hook_call_total=0x0000`
- `trace_capture_calls=0x0000`
- `trace_headers_addr=0xFF001A`
- `trace_desc_records_addr=0xFF009A`
- `staged_bg_buffer_addr=0xFF19BC`
